name: CoreMind Adapter
description: Forwards OpenClaw activity into CoreMind as signed WorldEvents, and lets CoreMind dispatch notifications, approvals, skills, and cron entries through OpenClaw.
author: Guillaume Gagnon

coremind_address.description: gRPC address of the CoreMind-side CoreMindHalf service (unix:// or host:port).

rpc_listen.description: gRPC address this extension listens on for OpenClawHalf RPCs.

buffer_path.description: Disk-backed queue for events emitted while CoreMind is unreachable.

channel_allowlist.description: Channels this adapter is permitted to surface events from and send on.
